content.text: 执行Linux 'free -m'命令获取详细内存信息。Executes Linux 'free -m' command to get detailed memory information including cache and buffer usage.
Consider using cross-platform memory functions for better compatibility

summary.text: 接收(usedMem, cachedMem)参数（MB）的回调函数。Callback function receiving (usedMem, cachedMem) in MB (null on error)

text.comment: 接收(usedMem, cachedMem)参数（MB）的回调函数。Callback function receiving (usedMem, cachedMem) in MB (null on error)

Function:

freeCommand

Description:

执行Linux 'free -m'命令获取详细内存信息。Executes Linux 'free -m' command to get detailed memory information including cache and buffer usage.

Example:
// Get detailed Linux memory info
freeCommand((usedMem, cachedMem) => {
  console.log(`Used memory: ${usedMem} MB`);
  console.log(`Cached memory: ${cachedMem} MB`);
});
Example:
// Memory monitoring on Linux servers
if (platform() === 'linux') {
  freeCommand((used, cached) => {
    const effectiveUsed = used - cached;
    console.log(`Effective memory usage: ${effectiveUsed} MB`);
  });
}
Deprecated:

Consider using cross-platform memory functions for better compatibility

Since:

1.0.0

See:
  • freemem - Cross-platform free memory function
  • totalmem - Cross-platform total memory function
